channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chery Group sales rise in South Africa, surpassing Volkswagen and nearing Suzuki
item.description: South Africa’s automotive market is seeing a noticeable shift in brand rankings. While Toyota maintains its position as the leading automaker, Suzuki has recently overtaken Volkswagen for second place...

item.title: Saif Ali Khan Starrer 'Kartavya' Trailer Released, Showcases Cop's Struggle Between Duty and Personal Life
item.description: The trailer for the upcoming Netflix film 'Kartavya' has been released, featuring Saif Ali Khan in a pivotal role as a police officer navigating a complex web of personal and professional challenges. ...

item.title: Kericho Man Stranded in Dubai Safely Rescued and Flown Back Home
item.description: A young man from Kericho called Brian Kipkoech who went to Dubai looking for construction jobs has been rescued after months of living rough on the streets of Jebel Ali. Videos showing him disoriented...

item.title: Practical Outdoor Lighting Options to Enhance Your Home and Garden
item.description: As outdoor living season approaches, homeowners are increasingly seeking effective and stylish ways to illuminate their outdoor spaces. Proper lighting does more than provide visibility; it transforms...

item.title: How to Access Your CSIR UGC NET December 2025 e-Certificates
item.description: The CSIR UGC NET authorities have announced the release of e-certificates for the December 2025 examinations. These certificates are crucial for candidates who have successfully cleared the exam and a...

item.title: TOWIE star Jake Hall dies at 35 from head injuries in Majorca
item.description: Jake Hall, a former star of the popular reality television series The Only Way Is Essex, has died at the age of 35. The model, artist, and ex-footballer passed away while on holiday in Spain, specific...

item.title: CPP Investments to exit European non-performing loan portfolio with $1B in proceeds
item.description: The Canada Pension Plan Investment Board (CPP Investments) has agreed to sell its remaining interest in a European non-performing loan portfolio to a joint venture backed by funds managed by Arrow Glo...

item.title: Vegetarian Presidential Banquet and UP Cuisine Map Stir Online Reactions
item.description: The recent presidential banquet hosted by Droupadi Murmu for Vietnamese President Tô Lâm, alongside the announcement of Uttar Pradesh’s district-wise culinary map, has drawn widespread attention on so...

item.title: How the lake that protected Tenochtitlan became the key to its fall
item.description: The article argues that Tenochtitlan did not fall only because of hunger, disease, or Spanish military superiority, but also because the conquerors learned to turn the city’s surrounding lake into a d...

item.title: Winnipeg unveils redevelopment vision for historic St. Boniface water tower
item.description: City officials and community stakeholders in Winnipeg have revealed new plans for the future of the historic St. Boniface water tower, a long-standing landmark in the neighbourhood. The project aims t...

item.title: Poll shows public remains divided and uncertain over Trump’s SAVE America voting bill
item.description: A new POLITICO poll finds that public opinion on the SAVE America Act, a high‑profile election‑security bill backed by President Donald Trump, is mixed and still taking shape. While a narrow plurality...

item.title: Renewed Clashes Between Itale and Ishi Communities in Kogi Leave Lives Lost and Property Destroyed
item.description: Renewed fighting don break out between Itale and Ishi communities for Ibaji Local Government Area, Kogi State. Reports say some people don die and property worth millions of naira don scatter. The wah...

item.title: Taiwan likely to feature in Trump-Xi talks amid cautious diplomatic stance
item.description: Ahead of a highly anticipated summit between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, concerns are rising about potential manoeuvring by China regarding Taiwan. The summit, schedule...

item.title: QC Court Rejects Mans Carpio Petition Against Sara Duterte Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: A Quezon City court has junked the petition filed by Vice President Sara Duterte's husband, Mans Carpio, seeking to halt the impeachment proceedings against her. This development marks a significant s...

item.title: Junior Springboks maintain unchanged lineup ahead of decisive clash with New Zealand
item.description: The Junior Springboks are heading into a crucial U20 Rugby Championship clash against New Zealand with a strong sense of continuity after coach Kevin Foote opted to largely stick with a winning combin...

item.title: Paul Hollywood Fined for Speeding at 96mph While Rushing Sick Cat to Vet on M25
item.description: Great British Bake Off judge Paul Hollywood was caught speeding at 96mph on the M25 motorway while trying to get his sick cat to the veterinarian quickly. According to court proceedings at Worthing Ma...

item.title: Man arrested over sale of former chief of staff's stolen mobile
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have apprehended a 28-year-old man on suspicion of handling a stolen phone that belonged to Morgan McSweeney, who served as the prime minister's chief of staff. The arrest occu...

item.title: India urges Bangladesh to accelerate verification of undocumented migrants for repatriation
item.description: India on Thursday urged Bangladesh to accelerate the process of nationality verification for undocumented Bangladeshi migrants so that they can be repatriated in an orderly and smooth manner. The Mini...

item.title: BSP Officials Dominate List of Highest-Paid Government Officials in 2025
item.description: According to the Commission on Audit’s Report on Salaries and Allowances (ROSA) for 2025, Eli Remolona, governor of the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP), continues to be the highest-paid non-elected ...

item.title: Geography Quiz: Identifying the Country Between Ecuador and Bolivia
item.description: This article presents a travel quiz designed for readers who enjoy testing their geographic knowledge. The focus is on a specific route in South America, asking which country travellers must pass thro...
